sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ إِلَى مَطْعَمٍ لِتَنَاوُلِ الْغَدَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je otišla u restoran na ručak.
sentences.translationEn: The family went to a restaurant for lunch.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرُوا إِلَى قَائِمَةِ الطَّعَامِ وَاخْتَارُوا الْأَطْبَاقَ.
sentences.translation: Pogledali su jelovnik i odabrali jela.
sentences.translationEn: They looked at the menu and chose their dishes.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ الْأَبُ الشَّوْرَبَةَ وَطَلَبَتِ الْأُمُّ السَّلَطَةَ.
sentences.translation: Otac je naručio supu a majka salatu.
sentences.translationEn: The father ordered soup and the mother ordered salad.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ الطَّعَامُ سَرِيعًا وَكَانَ كُلُّهُ لَذِيذًا.
sentences.translation: Hrana je brzo stigla i sve je bilo ukusno.
sentences.translationEn: The food came quickly and everything was delicious.
